data.title: Implement one-way ratchet and remove pass 3+ escalation in REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Modify plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md escalation logic (lines 565-592):

1. ADD RATCHETED_TIER variable: Initialize to empty before the resolution loop. Set when ESCALATE_REVIEW triggers tier escalation (from Step 4a added by story 54eb-fd24). Format: RATCHETED_TIER='' (unset initially), RATCHETED_TIER='standard' or 'deep' after escalation.

2. REMOVE pass 3+ auto-escalation block (lines 577-580): Delete the 'if REVIEW_PASS_NUM >= 3' branch that forces all tiers to full deep pipeline. This block is replaced by the ratchet mechanism.

3. MODIFY re-review dispatch logic: Before selecting RE_REVIEW_AGENT, check RATCHETED_TIER. If set, use the higher of (RATCHETED_TIER, current escalation result from pass 2 rules). Ordinal mapping: light=1, standard=2, deep=3. The ratchet only goes up.

4. PRESERVE pass 2 non-escalated behavior: The pass 2 logic (light→standard at pass 2, deep→full pipeline at pass 2) remains unchanged. Ratchet only affects re-reviews AFTER an ESCALATE_REVIEW has been processed.

5. UPDATE the escalation table to document the ratchet: Replace the pass 3+ row with a RATCHETED_TIER row explaining that escalation persists.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] RATCHETED_TIER variable present in bash block
  Verify: grep -q 'RATCHETED_TIER' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Pass 3+ auto-escalation removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'REVIEW_PASS_NUM.*-ge 3' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Pass 2 behavior preserved (light→standard, deep→full)
  Verify: grep -q 'REVIEW_TIER.*==.*light' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Ratchet tests pass
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_review_workflow_model_escalation.py --tb=short -q
